disclaimer: Past performance is not a reliable indication of future performance.

footerNotes.text: All our funds are invested in line with our sustainable investment policy. All Westpac KiwiSaver Scheme funds (except the Cash fund) have been certified by RIAA. RIAA does not currently assess cash funds as part of the Certification Program.
Return - past performance is not a reliable indication of future performance. Returns for any fund will vary and may be negative at times, which means your balance can be less than what you invested.

Risk - the Default Balanced Fund started on 1 December 2021 and the High Growth Fund started on 25 September 2024. This means these funds do not have a full five-year return history. To calculate the risk indicator for the Default Balanced Fund, market index returns and actual returns have been used. To calculate the risk indicator for the High Growth Fund, only market index returns have been used. As a result, the risk indicators for these funds may provide a less reliable indication of the funds' potential future volatility.

The Responsible Investment Certification Program does not constitute financial product advice. Neither the Certification Symbol nor RIAA recommends to any person that any financial product is a suitable investment or that returns are guaranteed. Appropriate professional advice should be sought prior to making an investment decision. RIAA does not hold a Financial Advice Provider licence.

fee.label: Fee
fee.description: {cents}c per $100 of your balance per year

returns.label: Return
returns.description: Estimated average annual return over 5 years

riskIndicator.label: Risk
riskIndicator.description: How much the fund goes up and down

funds.name: Growth Fund
funds.description: Higher long-term capital growth. Significant short-term fluctuations expected. Predominantly growth assets.

funds.name: Balanced Fund
funds.description: Blend of growth and income assets. Moderate growth with some downside protection.

funds.name: Moderate Fund
funds.description: Income-tilted with some growth exposure. Shorter timeframe or lower volatility tolerance.

funds.name: Conservative Fund
funds.description: Primarily income assets. Short timeframe or capital preservation focus.
